title: Maria Sandoval
compiled_truth: Maria Sandoval is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-10 to 2001-10-15), Maria Sandoval sent 25 and received 161 emails, totalling 186 interactions. Top correspondents: [Andrea Guillen](people/andrea-guillen) (25), [Judy Hernandez](people/judy-hernandez) (25), [Yolanda Pena](people/yolanda-pena) (25), [Phenicia Olivier](people/phenicia-olivier) (24), [Chantelle Villanueva](people/chantelle-villanueva) (24).
